# Read the file
path = "/mnt/data/file-3No11UphUYESvacoNSgd7A-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "rb") as f:
    data = f.read()
data[:2000], len(data)

text = data.decode('utf-8')
# print segments around known phrases
for phrase in ["وَآتِ ذَا الْقُرْبَى", "يَا بَنِي آدَمَ", "قُلْ مَنْ حَرَّمَ زِينَةَ اللَّهِ", "كلوا واشربوا والبسوا وتصدقوا في غير إسراف ولا مخيلة"]:
    idx = text.find(phrase)
    print(phrase, idx)
    if idx!=-1:
        print(text[idx-40:idx+120])

# Find the quoted segment for the first occurrence near idx 924
start_quote = text.rfind('"', 0, 924+50)  # find previous quote
end_quote = text.find('"', 924)
start_quote, end_quote, text[start_quote:end_quote+1]

idx2 = text.find("يَا بَنِي آدَمَ")
start_quote2 = text.rfind('"', 0, idx2+5)
end_quote2 = text.find('"', idx2)
start_quote2, end_quote2, text[start_quote2:end_quote2+1]

idx3 = text.find("قُلْ مَنْ حَرَّمَ زِينَةَ اللَّهِ")
start_quote3 = text.rfind('"', 0, idx3+5)
end_quote3 = text.find('"', idx3)
start_quote3, end_quote3, text[start_quote3:end_quote3+1]

idx4 = text.find("كلوا واشربوا")
start_quote4 = text.rfind('"', 0, idx4+5)
end_quote4 = text.find('"', idx4)
start_quote4, end_quote4, text[start_quote4:end_quote4+1]

spans = []
candidates = [
    ("وَآتِ ذَا الْقُرْبَى حَقَّهُ وَالْمِسْكِينَ وَابْنَ السَّبِيلِ وَلا تُبَذِّرْ تَبْذِيرًا * إِنَّ الْمُبَذِّرِينَ كَانُوا إِخْوَانَ الشَّيَاطِينِ وَكَانَ الشَّيْطَانُ لِرَبِّهِ كَفُوراً", "Aya"),
    ("يَا بَنِي آدَمَ خُذُوا زِينَتَكُمْ عِنْدَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ وَكُلُوا وَاشْرَبُوا وَلا تُسْرِفُوا إِنَّهُ لا يُحِبُّ الْمُسْرِفِينَ", "Aya"),
    ("قُلْ مَنْ حَرَّمَ زِينَةَ اللَّهِ الَّتِي أَخْرَجَ لِعِبَادِهِ", "Aya"),
    ("كلوا واشربوا والبسوا وتصدقوا في غير إسراف ولا مخيلة", "Hadeeth"),
]
for span_text, typ in candidates:
    start = text.find(span_text)
    end = start + len(span_text)
    ok = (start!=-1) and (text[start:end]==span_text)
    print(typ, start, end, ok)
    # show context
    if ok:
        print(text[start-20:start+len(span_text)+20])
    spans.append((span_text, typ, start, end, ok))

# For the first ayah, find the quote indexes
idx = text.find("وَآتِ ذَا الْقُرْبَى")
startq = text.rfind('"', 0, idx+1)
endq = text.find('"', idx)
inner1 = text[startq+1:endq]
start = startq+1
end = endq
inner1, start, end, text[start-5:start+5], text[end-5:end+5]

results = []
# Using inner1 for first
results.append({"span_text": inner1, "type":"Aya", "start":start, "end":end})
# other three we earlier found via find
for span_text, typ in candidates[1:]:
    s = text.find(span_text)
    e = s + len(span_text)
    assert text[s:e]==span_text
    results.append({"span_text": span_text, "type":"Aya" if typ=="Aya" else "Hadeeth", "start":s, "end":e})

for r in results:
    print(r["start"], r["end"], r["type"], r["span_text"][:60])
